{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Mistress Agnos
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mistress Agnos]] is a woman [[Indirial]] met.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] addresses [[Olissa]] as [[Mistress Agnos]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"It was an honor to meet you, Mistress Agnos."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“Mistress Agnos, if I know anything about the Eldest—and unfortunately I do), then he is just inside the workshop, waiting to appear dramatically as soon as we need him.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
